creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended


None of the active developers still has such a drive available for 
testing or development work. 

I see only two chances how to finally close this: 

1	One of the people owning such a drive submits a fix, or 
2	We declare the `mcd' driver `unsupported'. 

Before taking route #2, i'd like to wait whether the originator would be 
willing to go #1.
